Variables.Name: TargetDimensions
Variables.Description: How many dimensions input data has

Variables.Name: Radius
Variables.Description: Default radius for each target, scaled by per-Target ScaleFactor

Variables.Name: TwistAxis
Variables.Description: Axis to use when DistanceMethod is SwingAngle

Variables.Name: WeightThreshold
Variables.Description: Weight below which we shouldn't bother returning a contribution from a target
